summary: Completed e2e testing of P1 and P2 features: Buy Points with CherryHub integration, Promo Code system (one-time use per user), Vouchers API, and Instagram integration for Social Feed. All 22 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified for Rewards page (Buy Points modal, Promo Code modal) and Social Feed page (Instagram tab with demo posts).

issues: Some demo Instagram post images appear as black/empty placeholders - images load from Unsplash but may fail occasionally

critical_code_review_comments: Buy Points API correctly validates 4 packages (p1, p2, p3, p4) with bonus points for higher tiers
Promo Code one-time use enforcement works correctly - second use returns 400 'already used' error
All 5 promo codes working: WELCOME50, LUNA100, FREEDRINK, FREEENTRY, VIP2024
Instagram API in demo mode with sample images - ready for production API keys
CherryHub integration in MOCK mode - points are tracked locally with sync to CherryHub when live
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created for promo code testing (promo_test_*, voucher_test_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1/P2 features fully tested. Buy Points packages: p1 (100pts/$10), p2 (500+50/$45), p3 (1000+150/$80), p4 (2500+500/$180). Promo codes: WELCOME50 (50pts), LUNA100 (100pts), FREEDRINK (1 drink voucher), FREEENTRY (1 entry voucher), VIP2024 (75pts + 2 drinks). Instagram integration in demo mode. CherryHub integration in mock mode.

buy_points_api.notes: MOCKED - CherryHub integration uses mock mode

promo_code_apply.one_time_use_enforcement: VERIFIED - Second use correctly returns 400 error

vouchers_api.notes: Returns user vouchers created from promo codes

instagram_feed_api.notes: DEMO MODE - Returns placeholder images from Unsplash

social_feed_ui.notes: Instagram tab correctly loads demo posts with captions

mocked_apis.CherryHub: Points purchase and sync uses mock mode - points tracked locally
mocked_apis.Instagram Graph API: Demo mode with sample images from Unsplash - ready for production API keys

code_fix_applied.issue: Import statement for 'api' was incorrectly placed inside the component function
code_fix_applied.fix: Moved 'import { api } from '../src/utils/api';' to top of file with other imports
